title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind's Gemini audio stack processes speech with a single API call to extract speaker labels, timestamps, emotion tags, language detection, and summaries. Gemini 3.1 Flash Live enables real-time sound-to-sound multimodal processing with integrated reasoning. Lyria 3 generates full songs with lyrics, callable via tool use from Gemini Live.
writeup: Thor Schaeff of Google DeepMind walks through Gemini's audio stack across three layers. For transcription, a single API call extracts speaker labels, timestamps, emotion tags, language detection, and summaries. Gemini 3.1 Flash Live handles real-time sound-to-sound multimodal processing with integrated reasoning, and Lyria 3 generates full songs with lyrics, callable via tool use from Gemini Live. The takeaway is a unified path from speech analysis to live interaction to music generation within one model family.
